title: Enhanced Manhunt Mod.
description:
A Manhunt mod for 1.21.1
A feature-packed Manhunt mod designed to make the experience smoother and more competitive. This mod is built for Fabric 1.21.1 and includes tools for both Hunters and the Speedrunner.
body:
Manhunt Utility (Fabric 1.21.1)
This is a utility mod designed for the "Manhunt" mini-game. It provides automated roles and tracking tools through simple commands.

Functional Features:
Role Assignment: Use /speedrunner <player> and /hunter <player> to assign roles.

Tracking Compasses:

Hunters: Receive a compass that updates to point toward the Speedrunner's current location.

Speedrunners: Receive a compass that locates Strongholds. While in the Nether, the player can crouch to toggle between locating Fortresses and Bastions.

Attribute Modifiers: When a player is assigned the Speedrunner role, they receive a +2.0 base attack damage modifier and a 20% increase to base mining efficiency.

Technical Details:
Environment: This mod is required on both the Server and the Client for all features to function correctly.

Dependencies: Requires Fabric API.

Loader: Fabric 1.21.1.
